generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance SpeedControllerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle steering feedback"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor, DepthCameraSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraSensor
]

instance SpeedFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedControllerSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera visual data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance SpeedFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor speed feedback data from Vedder ESC"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data from vehicle steering system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data from perception processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model for speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 implementation for ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for prototyping and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data processing for point cloud clustering and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control system processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, VehicleStateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system processing in cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCSystemProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable, speed adjustment, emergency braking via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableDisable, SpeedAdjustment, EmergencyBraking
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks and driving path for driver trust"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports of vehicle state for analysis"
]

instance ACCSystemProcessing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC control model for speed computation"
]

instance RemoteEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of vehicle operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote speed adjustment via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle steering"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LidarSensor, DepthCameraSensor, SpeedControllerSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:contains DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlModel, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserInterface
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CloudService
]

instance UserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote management operations"
]

instance CloudService : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based computation offloading for ACC system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of desired speed commands, emergency braking signals, and ACC control outputs from Digital Twin Entity to physical twin's motor and steering actuators via ROS2 network, with data translation for protocol compatibility."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (visualization and control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi networks."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for real-time monitoring and control; also used in design phase for experimentation and validation (as designed)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with data serialized and translated via Data Translation component."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed in cloud environment; Cross-System Entity (Data Translation) distributed across network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2 Reference Architecture) adapted for automotive use; compliance with 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V latency."
]
